! WELCOME TO THE SECRET ADVENTURE!WE HID THIS REGION AND LEFT IT OFF THE MAP IN THE MANUAL TO IL-LUSTRATE AN IMPORTANT POINT: SOMETIMES THE BEST MAPS IN AD- VENTURE GAMES ARE THE ONES THAT ONLY TELL YOU PART OF THE STORY!(SOMETIMES THEY MAY EVEN LIE!) THIS ADVENTURE WILL GIVE YOU LOTS OF CHANCES TO PRACTICE YOURSKILLS IN DEALING WITH BOTH HOS-TILE AND FRIENDLY CREATURES THATYOU'LL FIND IN THE 3 "BASE SETS"AVAILABLE FOR YOUR USE. LOOK FOR MONSTERS YOU'LL WANT TO USE IN THE GAMES YOU WANT TO DESIGN.SINCE YOU CAN MAKE EVERY MONSTERAND PERSON A LITTLE BIT DIFFER- ENT FROM EVERYONE ELSE WITH THE SAME NAME AND PICTURE, DON'T AS-SUME THAT EVERY DWARF YOU SEE CARRYING AN AXE WILL BEHAVE AND PERFORM IN THE SAME WAY. ONE MAY BE STRENGTH 10, ANOTHER 100 ONCE YOU'VE PLAYED THROUGH THIS ADVENTURE, YOU MAY WANT TO USE THE CONSTRUCTION SET TO COME BACK AND EXAMINE SOME OF THE CREATURES AND SEE HOW THEY WERE "PROGRAMMED". MAKE SURE TO USE THE HOSPITAL SQUARE AND READY A WEAPON BEFORE STARTING OUT!
